title: ZN Vanila (Reborn)
description: ZN Vanila is modpack for a comfortable and stable vanila game with RP elements on local and servers
body:
# EN:
Mods for a comfortable and stable game with RP elements.

The modpack is designed for a vanilla experience, both in single-player worlds and on servers.

The modpack includes the [ZN Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/zn-lite-reborn) sub-modpack, which significantly optimizes your Minecraft. It also features popular mods such as PlasmoVoice, Distant Horizons, Iris Shaders, and others, ensuring a smooth, enjoyable, and user-friendly gameplay experience with seamless player interactions.

You can view the full list of mods by clicking on the modpack version in the releases menu.
